creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
it happens to me also,using these arguments :

bhyve -S -c 4 -m 8G -w -H \
-s 0,hostbridge \
-s 1,ahci-cd,/mnt/da2s1/ISO/Windows/Win.All.85in1.June.2021__CmTeamPK.CoM.iso \
-s 2,ahci-cd,/home/marietto/Downloads/virtio-win-0.1.208.iso \
-s 3,virtio-blk,/mnt/da2s1/OS/bhyve/Windows/win7.img \
-s 4,fbuf,tcp=0.0.0.0:5900,w=1440,h=900,wait \
-s 5:0,passthru,2/0/0,rom=TU102.rom \
-s 5:1,passthru,2/0/1 \
-s 5:2,passthru,2/0/2 \
-s 5:3,passthru,2/0/3 \
-s 8,virtio-net,tap0 \
-s 9,virtio-9p,sharename=/home/marietto \
-s 30,xhci,tablet \
-s 31,lpc \
-l bootrom,/usr/local/share/uefi-firmware/BHYVE_UEFI.fd \
vm0
